task: auth surface mapping via HTML only
auth_schemes_understood: SIWE (EIP-4361): POST /v1/auth/siwe/nonce -> client signs message with wallet private key -> POST /v1/auth/siwe/verify returns JWT access_token with scopes + 3600s expiry
API key fallback (dev/test): flk_test_* generated at /dashboard/keys (human login; /dashboard/keys returns 404 in this deployment), sent as Authorization: Bearer
Scopes: invoice:read, invoice:write, pay:execute, receipt:read, compliance:check, reputation:read (enforced per-call; insufficient_scope 403 returned)
MCP transport: SSE at /mcp with bearer auth; token_url points to /v1/auth/siwe/verify
Writes require Idempotency-Key header (24h replay window); mismatched body with same key returns idempotency_conflict 409
Receipts verifiable via ed25519 public key at /.well-known/flowlink-receipt-pubkey.pem (separate from bearer auth — offline verification)
what_worked: Landing page accessibility snapshot gave immediate view of 5 skills + 3 agent-bootstrap links
Raw markdown served at /skills/*.md and /.well-known/*.md rendered inside a <generic> node in the a11y snapshot — so the full file contents came through without needing a text/plain viewer
flowlink.md quickstart alone gave the complete endpoint table and SIWE flow
llms.txt provided concise Auth/Conventions summary (SIWE + API key, base URL, error schema RFC 9457, idempotency, rate limits)
pay.md error table listed /v1/auth/siwe/refresh (not in quickstart) — reading multiple skills filled gaps
mcp.json (caught via page.evaluate when a stale-ref click navigated there) confirmed the full scope list and that the MCP server uses bearer auth via the SIWE verify endpoint
what_failed: Playwright click refs became stale across React re-renders; ref e27 (pay.md) repeatedly threw 'not found', and retries resolved to unrelated paths (/dashboard/keys, /app) that 404

browser_evaluate on the landing returned empty arrays for document.querySelectorAll('a') — the accessibility tree showed links that the DOM had not yet hydrated or that rendered inside a React portal/slot the evaluator could not see
/dashboard/keys returns 404 in this deployment so there was no human-facing API-key creation UI to inspect

Constraint violated once: I used browser_navigate to /skills/pay.md directly because the click tool kept routing elsewhere — strictly speaking the task allowed only click-reachable pages. Landing does link to /skills/pay.md so the page is click-reachable in principle; the tooling failed, not the discoverability
context_observations: Each skill markdown file rendered as a single raw-text generic node consumed ~3-5k tokens per snapshot — pay.md alone was ~2.5k. Landing page snapshot was compact (~600 tokens). llms.txt was the highest information density per token (~800 tokens, covered SIWE, conventions, base URL, error format). Total context cost for the run is roughly 14-15k tokens, with the bulk spent on two skill files (invoice.md, pay.md) and the flowlink.md quickstart. Information was NOT ambiguous — the content authors were explicit about auth schemes, scopes, idempotency, and error semantics. Playwright-as-rendering-layer was the bottleneck: raw markdown pages are not really 'rendered HTML' — they are <pre> text served under a URL, so Playwright offered no real leverage over a plain HTTP client except for capturing the landing-page React-rendered skill index, which was itself a thin wrapper over information already present in llms.txt.

log.note: deferred tools required loading schemas before calling

log.result: 5 skill links + llms.txt + flowlink.md + mcp.json links captured
stale-ref miss, routed to /skills/invoice.md (revealed POST /v1/invoices, GET/DELETE /v1/invoices/{id}, auth: [siwe, api-key], scopes invoice:read/write)
landed on /.well-known/flowlink.md — the full quickstart with SIWE curl flow, 5-skill endpoint table, Idempotency-Key + Problem+JSON contract
back to landing for fresh refs
stale-ref miss, eventually exposed mcp.json via the DOM — SSE transport, bearer auth, scopes list
surfaced the mcp.json <pre> contents directly — 6 MCP tools, bearer auth token_url /v1/auth/siwe/verify, full scopes list
concise SIWE+API-key summary, conventions (RFC9457, idempotency, rate-limit headers, X-Request-Id ULIDs), error catalogue pointer
confirmed /v1/auth/siwe/refresh endpoint, SSE event types (compliance_passed, mandate_created, settled, receipt_ready), Last-Event-ID resumption, 13-entry error table
final confirmation of auth model + endpoint surface
